project_type: Go backend + Vue 3 SPA (admin + portal) VPN management panel
build_system: npm + vite for frontend, go build for backend
test_framework: vitest for frontend, go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/shared && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && npm run build && cd ../portal && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../../ && go build ./...
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm run test && cd ../../.. && go test ./...
verification_instructions: 1. npm install && npm run build in both admin and portal. 2. go build ./... for backend. 3. go test ./... for backend tests
snapshot_or_generated_files: panel/web/admin/www/ and panel/web/portal/www/ are built assets that get committed with git add -f
setup_instructions: cd panel/web/shared && npm install; cd panel/web/admin && npm install; cd panel/web/portal && npm install
environment_constraints: Use timeout 180000 for npm commands. Vite must be ^5.4.19 not ^6.0.0 due to ERESOLVE errors with @vitejs/plugin-vue on deploy server. Branch: fix-all-issues from main.
contribution_requirements: Create branch fix-all-issues from main. Commit pre-built www/ with git add -f. Do not update old PRs - create new ones or push to main.
key_patterns: useApi composable for all HTTP. Pinia stores. KTabs/KFormField/KInput/KSelect shared components. i18n via useI18n with EN/FA/ZH/RU locales. Theme system with 5 themes + system/dark/light modes. Backend: mux-based routing, SQL queries, session cookies.
directory_structure: panel/ = Go backend + web frontends. panel/web/admin/ = admin SPA. panel/web/portal/ = customer portal SPA. panel/web/shared/ = shared components/composables. panel/internal/ = Go packages. node/ = node agent Go code.
